context: Tests whether the agent correctly orders Dockerfile instructions to maximise layer caching for npm dependencies. The critical pattern is COPY package*.json before RUN npm ci, followed by COPY . . for application code.

checklist.name: Dependency files copied first
checklist.description: COPY of package.json and/or package-lock.json appears BEFORE the npm install/ci RUN instruction in the Dockerfile

checklist.name: App code copied after install
checklist.description: COPY . . (or equivalent broad copy of source code) appears AFTER the npm install/ci RUN instruction

checklist.name: Pinned base image tag
checklist.description: FROM uses a specific Node.js version tag (e.g., node:20-alpine) and NOT :latest

checklist.name: Non-root user
checklist.description: A non-root user is created and the USER instruction appears before CMD/ENTRYPOINT

checklist.name: COPY used instead of ADD
checklist.description: Dockerfile uses COPY for all file-copy operations; ADD is NOT used for plain file copying

checklist.name: .dockerignore excludes node_modules
checklist.description: .dockerignore file is present and contains a node_modules/ entry

checklist.name: .dockerignore excludes secrets
checklist.description: .dockerignore contains entries for .env and/or .env.* to prevent secret leaks

checklist.name: Absolute WORKDIR
checklist.description: WORKDIR is set to an absolute path

checklist.name: Exec-form CMD
checklist.description: CMD uses JSON array syntax rather than shell string form
